name: Ka'au Crater Trail
tagline: One of Oahu's most rewarding secret hikes — past three waterfalls to a volcanic crater rim with jaw-dropping panoramic views.
parking: Street parking on Waiomao Rd; respect residents
bestTime: Early morning on dry days; extremely dangerous when wet
talkStory: One of Oahu's most rewarding secret hikes takes you deep into the rainforest past three waterfalls and up to the rim of a dormant volcanic crater. The trail is steep, muddy, and not for beginners — but locals consider it one of the island's finest adventures. The final view from the crater rim, looking across the Ko'olau Range to the Windward side, is unforgettable. Bring gloves for rope sections and allow 5-6 hours round trip.
